concerns.text: FR-001 requires loading exactly 10 tasks from ResearchClawBench. T015 describes filtering and writing an audit report, but no task explicitly implements the logic to load the 10 specific tasks into the execution context or map them to templates. The 'loader' (T007) is generic; a specific task to select and load the 10 tasks per FR-001 is missing.

FR-003 requires executing 'seven autonomous agents from the original study'. T023 implements the execution loop (140 runs) but lacks a task to implement the agent loading/instantiation logic (e.g., `src/agents/loader.py` or similar) required to actually instantiate and run the 7 specific agents. The plan assumes agents exist but provides no task to wire them up.

FR-005 and Plan (Statistical Rigor) mandate a pre-specified Wilcoxon test (or permutation) to avoid low-power normality failures at N=10. T028 implements a 'normality check' to dynamically select between t-test or Wilcoxon. This contradicts the mandatory experimental design in the Plan and Constitution, leaving the required pre-specified logic unimplemented.

FR-008 requires a validation step scoring 'Set A' (scaffold text only) and 'Set B' (steps only) to verify rubric behavior. T010 creates the schema, and T021 mentions validating the 'concept', but no task explicitly implements the dummy output generator or the specific validation runner required to execute the FR-008 check.

SC-003 requires reporting the '95% confidence interval of the mean difference' for Scientific Core stability. T030 generates a JSON report with test statistics and effect sizes, but does not explicitly include a task to calculate and report the specific CI for the mean difference, only the TOST results.

Plan (Statistical Rigor) proposes '3 independent generations per task' (N=30) for variance control. The Spec (FR-003) and Tasks (T023, T029) are hard-coded for N=10 (140 runs). There is no task to implement the logic for generating multiple samples per task or the aggregation logic required to support the Plan's proposed N=30 mitigation strategy, creating a gap between the Plan's strategy and the Spec's scope.

FR-001 requires retrieving a template for 'each' of the 10 tasks from a 'Curated Template Set'. T009 describes loading a single file `TEMPLATE-001-v1.0.md`. The task description implies a single static file rather than a mechanism to map 10 distinct tasks to potentially distinct templates in the set, risking incomplete coverage of the requirement.
